title: cynodon ciliatus
intro: Cynodon ciliatus, also known as the hairy couch grass or hairy panic grass, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is commonly used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Cynodon ciliatus include its ability to treat various ailments such as skin irritations, wounds, and fungal infections, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. Cynodon ciliatus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or topical ointments to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
